recommendations.title: In the Shadow of Iris
recommendations.overview: The sudden disappearance of a wealthy banker's wife cracks open a dizzying world of secret fetishes, desperate acts and elaborate deceptions.

recommendations.title: Yves Saint Laurent
recommendations.overview: A look at the life of French designer Yves Saint Laurent from the beginning of his career in 1958 when he met his lover and business partner, Pierre Berge.

recommendations.title: Headwinds
recommendations.overview: Sarah tells Paul that she wants out of their marriage; the next day she disappears. A year later and Paul along with their children return to his childhood town to start anew after the loss of his wife and their mother.

recommendations.title: Sunrise: A Song of Two Humans
recommendations.overview: A married farmer falls under the spell of a slatternly woman from the city, who tries to convince him to drown his wife.

recommendations.title: A House of Your Dreams
recommendations.overview: On a mission to loosen up, a miser's sets about buying a house in the country for his family.

recommendations.title: The Wizards Return: Alex vs. Alex
recommendations.overview: While trying to prove to her family she can be mature and responsible, teen wizard Alex Russo conjures up a spell to rid herself of her bad qualities, unintentionally creating a Good and Evil Alex. When Evil Alex gets involved in a plan to take over

recommendations.title: Instructions Not Included
recommendations.overview: Valentin is Acapulco's resident playboy, until a former fling leaves a baby on his doorstep and him heading with her out of Mexico.

recommendations.title: Nothing to Declare
recommendations.overview: During the elimination of the Belgian/French border in the 90s, a Belgian customs officer is forced to team up with one of his French counterparts.

recommendations.title: The Blue Dahlia
recommendations.overview: Soon after a veteran returns from war, his cheating wife is found dead. He evades police in an attempt to find the real murderer.

recommendations.title: Welcome to the Sticks
